articles.title: CALLING ALL INVESTORS! MEET YOUR NEW AI COPILOT
articles.summary: You don’t need complicated software to access custom charts, data and automation — just ask Pluto

articles.title: DATABRICKS ACQUIRES MOSAICML FOR $1B+
articles.summary: MosaicML has one of the industry leading toolkits for training large AI models while Databricks has the customer's data. The combination of the two seems sensible. Congrats to the team!

articles.title: AI PROGRAMMING ASSISTANT IN GOOGLE COLAB
articles.summary: Google Colab is an online, VM-backed, Jupyter Notebook interface. It has continually been the entry point for many programmers and AI developers. Google is now rolling out its AI coding assistant to Colab for Pro+ subscribers.

articles.title: HEAD OF RESEARCH LEAVES STABILITY AI
articles.summary: Stability AI, the closely watched artificial intelligence startup, has lost at least two top executives in recent weeks, including its Head of Research and Chief Operating Officer. David Ha, Head of Research for the London-based startup, resigned this month. Chief Operating Officer Ren Ito left in June.

articles.title: ADVANCED MAPPING TOOL UNDERSTANDING CITY DIVERSITY
articles.summary: Researchers have developed "SHGNN", a tool that smartly organizes city maps, accounting for significant variations between different locations. This new system effectively groups nearby similar locations, resulting in a more accurate representation of urban diversity.

articles.title: A ONE-STOP SOLUTION FOR IMAGE RESTORATION
articles.summary: "PromptIR" is a new method that uses prompts to restore high-quality images from degraded versions, regardless of the type or severity of degradation. This advanced technique adapts to a variety of image issues like noise, blur, and haze.

articles.title: LLM LIBRARY
articles.summary: An extensible, convenient, and efficient toolbox for fine tuning large machine learning models. Designed to be user-friendly, speedy, reliable, and accessible to the entire community.

articles.title: DRAGGAN CODE RELEASED
articles.summary: DragGAN allows you to edit photos by dragging parts of the image. Its development team has released the code and a live HuggingFace demo.

articles.title: KOR [https://github.com/eyurtsev/kor?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: Kor enables you to extract structured data from text using LLMs.

articles.title: GISKARD
articles.summary: Giskard is an open-source testing framework dedicated to ML models, from tabular models to LLMs.

articles.title: 🧰 VELLUM: A PLATFORM TO BUILD PRODUCTION LLM APPS
articles.summary: Done tinkering? Build and ship robust AI apps with Vellum

articles.title: THROUGH A GLASS DARKLY
articles.summary: A survey of AI experts from 2016 on their predictions for the future of the industry.

articles.title: OPENAI WANTS TO BUILD A WORK ASSISTANT
articles.summary: OpenAI plans to market a “personalized assistant for work,” a move that would seemingly put the buzzy startup in competition with its chief backer, Microsoft.

articles.title: HOPE, FEAR, AND AI
articles.summary: A poll of 2,000 people about how they’re using AI, what they want it to do, and what scares them about it the most.

articles.title: AI REQUIRES A NEW APPROACH TO WORK AND MANAGEMENT
articles.summary: Microsoft's Jared Spataro believes that AI will change the nature of work, including meetings and creative collaboration. He argues that we need to adopt a new approach to work and management in order to take advantage of the potential of AI. This includes using AI to automate tasks, personalize experiences, and make better decisions.

articles.title: AI IS KILLING THE OLD WEB
articles.summary: Generative AI models are changing the economy of the web, making it cheaper to generate lower-quality content that is flooding the web.

articles.title: USING BLOCKCHAINS AND AI TO BUILD A BETTER INTERNET
articles.summary: The age old question around if you should switch to AI from crypto. The real magic would be regulatory clarity for blockchain and AI - that will be the big winner.
